name: InboxZero Waitlist
headline: Pre-launch waitlist for an inbox-triage tool for founders
subheadline: Reclaim hours every week. Built for overwhelmed founders/execs.
solution: Pre-launch waitlist for an inbox-triage tool for founders.

cta.label: Join the waitlist
cta.note: Early-bird price locked for the first 50.

seoTitle: InboxZero Waitlist — Pre-launch waitlist for an inbox-triage tool…
seoDescription: Pre-launch waitlist for an inbox-triage tool for founders. Built for overwhelmed founders/execs. Free to use.

faq.a: Overwhelmed founders/execs. If that's you and "email overload kills focus" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Right now — everything on this page works immediately, free.

validationMetric: 150+ visits; target 30+ waitlist emails or 3 pre-orders in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <10 waitlist emails AND 0 pre-orders after 150 visits
biggestRisk: Waitlist signups != revenue; intent can be soft; you still have to build it
first10: Post the promise in 3 niche communities; 10 warm DMs; 1 Product Hunt 'coming soon'
